iterations.theme: The Challenge of Uprootedness and the Foundations of Healthy Patriotism
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration concludes the in-depth discussion on the first key topic, 'Faith and Patriotism,' including biblical examples, the stance of Jesus and St. Paul, and the example of Stepinac, before transitioning to the second topic of nurturing memory.
